text: Sabastian Sawe of Kenya wins London Marathon in world-record time, first to finish under two hours - AP News
fullText: Sabastian Sawe of Kenya has become the first person to break the fabled 2-hour barrier in the marathon in a huge moment in sports history. Sawe smashed the men’s world record by 65 seconds in winning the London Marathon in 1 hour, 59 minutes and 30 seconds. T…

text: Northern Ireland homes evacuated after reports of car bomb explosion - CBS News
fullText: Police in Northern Ireland declared a security alert in the town of Dunmurry, on the outskirts of Belfast, after reports that a car bomb exploded near a police station.

text: Mali’s Defence Minister Sadio Camara killed amid coordinated attacks - Al Jazeera
fullText: Death of influential minister seen as a big blow for Mali’s military government during fighting with armed groups.

text: Guest column | I study wearable health data. Here’s what continuous glucose monitors miss. - The Washington Post
fullText: Monitoring a constant stream of data doesn’t help people make health-related decisions and can lead to confusion and needless anxiety, experts say.

text: King will have 'appropriate security' for US trip, minister says - BBC
fullText: The King is "being kept fully informed of developments" after the shooting, Buckingham Palace says.

text: Surviving in a poisoned land: Chernobyl's wildlife is different, but not in the ways you might think - BBC

text: 2 University of South Florida doctoral students were promising young researchers. Now a roommate is charged in their killing - CNN

text: Trump unhurt and suspect in custody after shots fired at White House correspondents' dinner - BBC
fullText: The US president is rushed out of the event at a Washington hotel, as police say the man, 31, had multiple weapons and was a "lone actor".

text: Red Sox fire manager Alex Cora after abysmal start to season - The Boston Globe
fullText: Triple-A manager Chad Tracy will serve as interim. Bench coach Ramón Vázquez, hitting coach Pete Fatse, third-base coach Kyle Hudson, and assistant hitting coach Dillon Lawson were also fired, along with hitting strategist Joe Cronin.

text: 1 police officer killed, another wounded, in shooting at Chicago's Endeavor Health Swedish Hospital, officials say - ABC7 Los Angeles
fullText: A Chicago police officer was killed and another was in critical condition after a suspect opened fire while in custody inside a hospital, officials said.

text: Senate panel schedules vote to advance Warsh as Powell probe dropped - The Washington Post
fullText: Senate panel schedules Wednesday vote on Kevin Warsh after U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro drops criminal probe into Fed Chair Jerome H. Powell.
